---
title: "Mon Portfolio"
---

<script type="importmap">
{
  "imports": {
    "three": "https://unpkg.com/three@0.160.0/build/three.module.js",
    "three/examples/jsm/loaders/GLTFLoader.js": "https://unpkg.com/three@0.160.0/examples/jsm/loaders/GLTFLoader.js",
    "three/examples/jsm/controls/OrbitControls.js": "https://unpkg.com/three@0.160.0/examples/jsm/controls/OrbitControls.js",
    "three/addons/libs/lil-gui.module.min.js": "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/lil-gui@0.19/+esm"
  }
}
</script>

::: {.viewers-wrapper}

::: {.viewer-card}
::: {#container1 .viewer-container}
:::
::: {.viewer-info}
### Chef de Guerre Oruk
Description en en cours.
:::
:::

::: {.viewer-card}
::: {#container2 .viewer-container}
:::
::: {.viewer-info}
### Boss de la Lune
Description en cours.
:::
:::

:::

<script type="module" src="main.js"></script>


<style>
.viewers-wrapper {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: row;
    gap: 20px;
    width: 100%;
    /* On enlève la hauteur fixe ici pour laisser la carte grandir */
    margin-top: 20px;
}

.viewer-card {
    flex: 1;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    border: 1px solid #ddd;
    border-radius: 8px;
    background: #ffffff;
    overflow: hidden; /* Pour que le rendu 3D respecte les bords arrondis */
}

.viewer-container {
    width: 100%;
    height: 450px; 
    background-color: #535353;
    position: relative;
}

.viewer-info {
    padding: 15px;
    color: #333333;
    text-align: center;
    border-top: 1px solid #eee;
}

@media (max-width: 800px) {
    .viewers-wrapper {
        flex-direction: column;
    }
}
</style>
